answer: Here is an SMS draft for the quote_101 customer. It is a draft only — sending requires your approval in the assisted-drafts inbox.

cards.body: Hi {{customer_name}}, following up on your carpet install estimate ({{estimate_total}}) from Saturday. Happy to answer anything — including the pet-safe adhesive question. Reply here or call {{business_phone}}.

evidence.claim: The customer asked about pet-safe adhesive
